criteria.criterion: DBB-m12-001: Exit code 0 on success (cat existing file)
DBB-m12-002: Exit code 1 on error (cat nonexistent file)
DBB-m12-003: Exit code 2 on misuse (unknown command)
DBB-m12-004: Exit code propagated through pipes
DBB-m12-005: Exit code always present in output object
DBB-m12-006: Input redirection grep < file works
DBB-m12-007: Input redirection file not found returns error
DBB-m12-008: Input redirection no match returns empty
DBB-m12-009: Input redirection combined with > output redirect
DBB-m12-010: Glob expansion ls *.ts matches files
DBB-m12-011: Glob expansion no match returns error
DBB-m12-012: Glob expansion with grep command
DBB-m12-014: All m12 tests pass (exit-codes-m12, input-redirection-m12, glob-pattern-m12 — 20/20 tests)
